---
title: Racist Anti-Immigrant Cartoons From the Turn of the 20th Century
author: Brian Resnick
format: html
image: https://philadelphiaencyclopedia.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/GreatFearofthePeriod_LOC.jpeg
image-alt: Anti-irish and chinese cartoon
---

<https://www.theatlantic.com/national/archive/2011/11/racist-anti-immigrant-cartoons-from-the-turn-of-the-20th-century/383248/>


![](https://philadelphiaencyclopedia.org/wp-content/uploads/2017/06/GreatFearofthePeriod_LOC.jpeg "Anti-irish and chinese cartoon")

The xenophobic and racist mindset of many Americans of the late nineteenth century is graphically illustrated by this political cartoon. Many white Americans feared the new wave of immigration. (Library of Congress)
